events.title: Iran Strikes Bahrain and Jordan in Retaliation for US Attacks
events.desc: Iran conducted retaliatory strikes against targets in Bahrain and Jordan. This action follows recent US attacks on Iranian ports and islands in the Strait of Hormuz, which were reportedly in response to the downing of an Iranian helicopter.

events.title: US Military Launches 'Self-Defense Strikes' Targeting Iran
events.desc: The US Central Command announced that its forces have commenced 'self-defense' strikes against Iran. This action is a direct response to escalations in the region.

events.title: Trump Vows Retaliation After Claiming Iran Shot Down Apache Helicopter
events.desc: President Trump accused Iran of shooting down a US Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and stated that the United States must respond, signaling an imminent retaliatory strike.

events.title: Israeli Forces Kill Nine in Tyre After Issuing Forced Displacement Orders
events.desc: Israeli forces killed nine people in the Lebanese city of Tyre within a 24-hour period, following the issuance of forced displacement orders for the city. Raids were conducted on multiple locations in southern Lebanon.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Fire After American Patrol Helicopter Downed in Hormuz
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes against Iran, with President Donald Trump stating it was retaliation for Iran allegedly downing a US Apache helicopter. Iranian media reported explosions along Iran's southern coast, and Iran's Foreign Minister threatened retaliation.

events.title: US Sea Drone Rescues Crew from US Army Helicopter That Crashed Near Hormuz
events.desc: A US Navy surface drone rescued two crew members from an Army Apache attack helicopter that crashed near Oman's coast. President Trump confirmed the pilots were unharmed, stating the helicopter went down while patrolling regional waters.

events.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
events.desc: The US military struck Iranian drones and radar sites, while Iran reported targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, marking a significant test of the current ceasefire.

events.title: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes on four residential buildings in Gaza City resulted in the deaths of 11 people, including women and children. The Israeli military stated that four Hamas security officials were among the dead.

events.title: Lebanese general among three soldiers killed in Israeli attack on car
events.desc: An Israeli attack on a car in south Lebanon resulted in the deaths of three soldiers, including a Lebanese general. The Israeli military is conducting an investigation into the incident.

events.title: Israel strikes Beirut suburb days after US-brokered truce
events.desc: Israel conducted strikes on a Beirut suburb, which it stated were in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory. This occurs days after a US-brokered truce.

events.title: US and Iran exchange fire after American patrol helicopter downed in Hormuz
events.desc: US forces launched strikes against Iran in retaliation for the alleged downing of an American Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump vowed a response.

events.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes targeted the city of Tyre in southern Lebanon, despite a warning from Iran to cease attacks on its ally Hezbollah. Iran stated it could resume hostilities if attacks continued.

events.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
events.desc: Both Iran and Israel have announced a pause in their strikes, with Iran's armed forces confirming a halt to military action and Israel's PM stating they are holding fire 'at the moment'. Both sides warned of retaliation if the ceasefire is breached.

events.title: Bolivia approves military measures against nationwide protests
events.desc: The Bolivian government has approved the deployment of military measures to address ongoing nationwide protests.

events.title: Protesters torch cars, buildings in Belfast after refugee knife attack
events.desc: Violent unrest has broken out in Belfast, with protesters torching vehicles and buildings following a stabbing attack allegedly carried out by a Sudanese man. Authorities have arrested the suspect.
